mapper.insert:
insert into config
id,
prop,
creat_time,
modify_time,
`name`,
namespace,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{prop,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
#{creatTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{namespace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update config
prop = #{prop,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
creat_time = #{creatTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
namespace = #{namespace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update config set prop = #{prop,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, creat_time = #{creatTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, namespace = #{namespace,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
